summary.overall_state: 37 pages visible in GSC, 441 unique queries, 12,149 impressions, 65 clicks (0.5% CTR) over 90 days. Early-stage organic visibility with very low click volume relative to impressions.
summary.main_strength: Homepage drives 7 clicks from 2,914 impressions across 67 queries.
summary.main_weakness: 10 pages with 100+ impressions but CTR below 2%. Large impression volume not converting to clicks.
summary.biggest_opportunity: 20 striking-distance queries (pos 4-20, 20+ impr). Top: 'gevelisolatie rotterdam' (1369 impr, pos 8.0).
summary.biggest_risk: 20 keywords with planner demand 100+/mo but weak/no page mapping. Potential content coverage gaps.

strengths: Homepage drives 7 clicks from 2,914 impressions across 67 queries.
weaknesses: 10 pages with 100+ impressions but CTR below 2%. Large impression volume not converting to clicks.

do_now.rationale: These queries rank pos 4-20 with meaningful impressions. Top: 'gevelisolatie rotterdam' (pos 8.0, 1369 impr), 'gevelisolatie almere' (pos 13.3, 828 impr), 'gevelisolatie leiden' (pos 6.4, 337 impr). Small ranking improvements could yield significant click gains.
do_now.risk: Position data is averaged over 90 days; actual daily position may vary.

do_now.action: Audit title tags and meta descriptions for 10 low-CTR pages
do_now.rationale: Top: /gevelisolatie/ (2,914 impr, 0.2% CTR). Improving SERP snippets could increase clicks without ranking changes.
do_now.risk: Low CTR may also reflect poor position or query mismatch, not just snippet quality.

do_now.rationale: Top: 'gevelisolatie rotterdam' appears on 6 pages (1369 impr). Consolidating to a primary page could improve rankings.
do_now.risk: Some multi-page visibility is normal for broad terms. Verify with manual SERP check before consolidating.

do_now.action: Review 15 commercially valuable queries with 0 clicks
do_now.rationale: These transactional/commercial queries get impressions but zero clicks. May indicate poor SERP positioning or snippet mismatch.
do_now.risk: Some may be low-relevance impressions at very poor positions.

monitor.action: Investigate 4 organic pages with weak engagement
monitor.rationale: Pages: (not set), /gevel-schilderen/, /sierpleister/. Sessions >= 5 but engagement rate < 40%. May indicate content-intent mismatch.
monitor.risk: Engagement rate thresholds are arbitrary. Check intent alignment before acting.

monitor.action: Redirect or clean up 14 legacy/unmapped pages with sessions
monitor.rationale: These pages receive traffic but aren't in the page inventory. May be old URLs that should 301-redirect.
monitor.risk: Some may be valid pages missing from inventory. Verify before redirecting.

monitor.rationale: Brand queries appearing on many pages is common and usually not harmful. No action needed unless specific pages are underperforming.
monitor.risk: Very low. Brand cannibalization is normal.

do_later.action: Consider content for 20 keyword gaps with planner demand 100+/mo
do_later.rationale: Top: 'buitenmuur isoleren' (1000/mo), 'isoleren van buitenmuren' (1000/mo), 'enkel steen muur isoleren' (590/mo). These terms have search demand but weak/no page targeting them. Some may need dedicated pages or content sections.
do_later.risk: Planner volumes are estimates. Validate with SERP analysis before creating new pages.

do_later.rationale: Queries about one theme land on pages about another. May indicate internal linking or page targeting issues.
do_later.risk: Theme classification is heuristic-based. Some mismatches are false positives.

limitations: Page mapping based on page_inventory v1
